hero.title: Financial solutions built around real people
hero.lead: {{brandName}} is a non-bank financial institution providing fast, transparent and responsible lending to households and small businesses across Bulgaria.

about.title: Why {{brandName}}?
about.p1: {{brandName}} is a non-bank financial institution that provides a broad portfolio of financial services. We combine proprietary technology with a conservative approach to risk to deliver credit products that are simple, fair and accessible.
about.p2: For years we have helped clients cover everyday and unexpected expenses with a fast application process, clear terms and a customer-first attitude — online and across our office network.
points: Fully transparent terms with no hidden fees
Decisions in minutes through proprietary scoring

mission.title: Responsible finance, accessible to everyone
mission.lead: To become one of the systematically important non-banking financial institutions in Bulgaria — trusted for our transparency, our technology and our commitment to responsible lending.

competencies.title: What makes us different
competencies.lead: Six strengths that let us serve clients responsibly at scale.

items.title: Teamwork
items.text: A dedicated team that puts clients first and works together to solve real financial needs.

items.title: Proprietary technology
items.text: In-house platforms and scoring models that make lending fast, accurate and secure.

items.title: Borrowing conservatism
items.text: A prudent, conservative approach to risk that protects both clients and the company.

items.title: Automation
items.text: Automated processes that cut waiting time and keep the cost of credit fair.

items.title: Synergy
items.text: Online and offline channels working together to reach clients wherever they are.

items.title: Digital expertise
items.text: Deep digital know-how applied to every step of the customer journey.

products.title: Credit that fits your life
products.lead: Clear, flexible products designed for everyday needs and larger plans alike.

p1.name: Online loans
p1.desc: Apply in minutes and receive a decision the same day. Short-term financing with fully transparent terms.

p2.name: Instalment loans
p2.desc: Larger amounts repaid in comfortable monthly instalments, with a schedule that fits your budget.

items.title: New office openings
items.excerpt: We continue to expand our office network to bring our services closer to clients across the country.

items.title: Upgraded online application
items.excerpt: A faster, simpler online application experience with instant decisions for returning clients.

items.title: Financial education partnership
items.excerpt: A new initiative promoting responsible borrowing and everyday financial literacy.

contacts.title: Get in touch
contacts.lead: Have a question about our products or your application? Our team is here to help.

footer.tagline: A non-bank financial institution providing responsible lending and financial services.
footer.disclaimer: Lending is subject to approval and responsible-lending checks.
